text:
10. Substituted by the Companies (Share Capital and Debentures) Amendment Rules, 2014,
w.e.f. 18-6-2014. Prior to its substitution, proviso read as under :
"Provided that a company engaged in the setting up of infrastructure projects may issue secured
debentures for a period exceeding ten years but not exceeding thirty years;"
section_title: 10. Substituted by the Companies (Share Capital and Debentures) Amendment Rules, 2014,
